task: Commit and push the Datalox trajectory MCP export work to GitHub using the user's configured git credentials.
summary: Committed and pushed the trajectory MCP export refocus branch to the configured GitHub origin.
observations: Committed 81f1260 with message Refocus Datalox as trajectory MCP export.
Pushed branch work/trajectory-dataset-export-v1 to origin at https://github.com/Complexity-LLC/datalox-pack.git.
The renamed repository URL https://github.com/Complexity-LLC/datalox-trajectory-mcp.git was not reachable during pre-push checks, so the branch was pushed to the existing configured GitHub remote.
Added .datalox/install.json and .datalox/tasks/ to .gitignore to keep machine-local install/task state out of commits.
title: Committed and pushed the trajectory MCP export refocus branch to the configured GitHub origin.
signal: Committed 81f1260 with message Refocus Datalox as trajectory MCP export.
recommendedAction: Create or rename the GitHub repository to Complexity-LLC/datalox-trajectory-mcp before relying on the README clone URL as the public install path.
